title: High-throughput quantitative analysis of isoprenyl acetate using Agilent RapidFire-QqQ system
author: Yan Chen

steps.title: Transfer the calculated volumes of test...
steps.instruction: Transfer the calculated volumes of test samples and mix them with previously filled general diluent solution using automated liquid handler. Using automated liquid handler reduces human error and increases accuracy and throughput, especially when multiple dilution factors are used and sample locations are randomized.

steps.title: Prepare IPA standard stock at 10 millimolar (mM) in MeOH
steps.instruction: Prepare IPA standard stock at 10 millimolar (mM) in MeOH. Prepare 200 µL IPA calibration standard at 500 micromolar (µM) ( 64 mg/L) by diluting IPA standard stock in Calibration standard diluent. IPA standard calibration range can be adjusted to fit estimated sample IPA amount and chosen sample dilution factor.

steps.title: Perform serial dilution of the highest...
steps.instruction: Perform serial dilution of the highest concentration standard in calibration standard diluent by a dilution factor of 2 .

steps.title: Leave one well containing 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Leave one well containing 100 µL of Calibration standard diluent as Blank.

steps.title: Condition RapidFire pumps by purging pumps...
steps.instruction: Condition RapidFire pumps by purging pumps 1, 2, and 3 at 5 mL/min flow rate, and pump 4 at 10 RPM for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Check the back pressure of RapidFire high-throughput mass spectrometry system
steps.instruction: Check the back pressure of RapidFire high-throughput mass spectrometry system. Monitor all pump's pressure until they are stabilized at expected range. A B C D 1 RapidFire state Pump 1 pressure (Mpa) Pump 2 pressure (Mpa) Pump 3 pressure (Mpa) 2 Aspirate 4.06 ~ 4.15 0.67 ~ 0.72 1.55 ~ 1.70 3 Load 4.08 ~ 4.15 0.67 ~ 0.72 1.55 ~ 1.70 4 Extra Wash 0.72 ~ 0.74 1.46 ~ 1.47 1.55 ~ 1.70 5 Elute 0.72 ~ 0.74 0.72 ~ 0.79 2.20 ~ 2.23 RapidFire-QqQ system pumps back pressures at the method flow rates in each cycle state Pay close attention to pumps pressure. Make sure they are stable at the expected range before starting your run. Diagnose and service RapidFire if pump pressure exceeds normal range.

substeps.instruction: Check the back pressure of RapidFire high-throughput mass spectrometry system. Monitor all pump's pressure until they are stabilized at expected range. A B C D 1 RapidFire state Pump 1 pressure (Mpa) Pump 2 pressure (Mpa) Pump 3 pressure (Mpa) 2 Aspirate

RapidFire-QqQ system pumps back pressures at the method flow rates in each cycle state Pay close attention to pumps pressure. Make sure they are stable at the expected range before starting your run. Diagnose and service RapidFire if pump pressure exceeds normal range.

steps.title: Transfer the volumes of general diluent...
steps.instruction: Transfer the volumes of general diluent solution using automated liquid handler to wells of Bio-Rad 96-well PCR plate that were designated for samples. Leave wells designated to Blank, QC, Calibration standards, and controls empty. Example analytical plate layout. Calibration standards could be arranged together with samples in one plate, or be prepared in a separate plate. For every plate that contains test samples, controls and QC are required, but their well locations could be random. Using automated liquid handler reduces human error and increases accuracy and throughput, especially when multiple dilution factors are used and sample locations are randomized.

steps.title: Finish preparing analytical plates by manually...
steps.instruction: Finish preparing analytical plates by manually filling Blank, QC, Calibration standards and controls, then sealing the sample plate with LC compatible non adhesive alumni seal. Store the plates in -20 °C if they are not processed immediately.

steps.title: Prepare sample matrix that contains everything...
steps.instruction: Prepare sample matrix that contains everything that is present in the typical sample except IPA. A typical sample suitable for this protocol could be but not limited to microbial fermentation broth, IPA trapping overlay such as dodecane, or extracted intracellular lysate of a microbial culture.

steps.title: Prepare the calibration standard diluent by...
steps.instruction: Prepare the calibration standard diluent by spiking the same volume ratio of sample matrix into general diluent solution as test samples into general diluent solution. Proper determination of sample dilution factor is import to make sure IPA measurement is in calibration linear range.

steps.title: Create plate maps that contain the desired RapidFire injection sequences
steps.instruction: Create plate maps that contain the desired RapidFire injection sequences. Example platemap that contains RapidFire injection sequence of a full 96-well sample plate

steps.title: Create and save a Run Template...
steps.instruction: Create and save a Run Template file when the application runs high-throughput screen assay that analyze numerous full sample plates or plates with same injection sequence. Example Run Template file that contains RapidFire injection sequence, RapidFire method, Cartridge choice, and MS method.

steps.title: Create and save a batch file...
steps.instruction: Create and save a batch file when the application runs single plate analysis or plates with multiple different injection sequences. Example Batch file that contains plate info(Barcode etc) and their respective injection sequence, RapidFire method, Cartridge choice, and MS method.

steps.title: Create sample path file according to analytical sample plate layout
steps.instruction: Create sample path file according to analytical sample plate layout. Fill in applied barcode information, well position, Sample name (File name), Sample type, assigned Calibration standard Levels and sample dilution factor(s). Example sample path file. Barcode column information needs to match applied barcode to corresponding plate. Well position, sample name, sample name_id and sample type are parsed from sample plate layout information. Calibration standard Levels are required for setting up quantitation method in Agilent QQQ quantitative analysis software. Dilution factor is a variable that could be modified accordingly. Run template file is generated and updated according to step 19.

steps.title: Load the saved batch file under...
steps.instruction: Load the saved batch file under RapidFire UI File drop down menu. Click the green arrow button and follow the prompt to start the plateset. RapidFire UI plateset run control panel

steps.title: Generate a Map File under RapidFire...
steps.instruction: Generate a Map File under RapidFire UI File drop down menu. Example map file that parses information from sample path file to data file.

steps.title: Import sample data file based on...
steps.instruction: Import sample data file based on the map file generated above. Click import sample data under RapidFire UI file drop down menu. Select sample path file generated in step 21 and Map file generated in step 22 to fill in Sample Data File section. Example result after import sample data. Check the end of the import log to make sure that all samples are imported without errors, warnings and skipped samples.

steps.title: Click the green arrow button and...
steps.instruction: Click the green arrow button and follow the prompt to start the plateset.

steps.title: Load all sample plates in RapidFire stacker
steps.instruction: Load all sample plates in RapidFire stacker. RapidFire plate stacker with loaded sample plates

steps.title: Create and save a RapidFire method...
steps.instruction: Create and save a RapidFire method using the following RapidFire Cycle parameters and pump flow rates: A B C 1 State Time (ms) Flow rate (mL/min) 2 Aspirate 600 3 Load 3000 1.25 4 Extra Wash 0 0.5 5 Elute 5000 0.5 6 Reequilibrate 500 1.25 RapidFire Cycle duration and flow rates for IPA and internal standard quantitation

substeps.instruction: Create and save a RapidFire method using the following RapidFire Cycle parameters and pump flow rates: A B C 1 State Time (ms) Flow rate (mL/min) 2 Aspirate 600 3 Load 3000
RapidFire Cycle duration and flow rates for IPA and internal standard quantitation

steps.title: Install and condition RapidFire C18 4...
steps.instruction: Install and condition RapidFire C18 4 µL, Type C cartridge (Agilent Part Number: G9205A). Tracking sample counts on the working C18 cartridge and Install multiple ones if the number of total injection samples is greater than the maximum allowed injections per cartridge. Use the same cartridge type name if multiple C18 cartridges are installed.

steps.title: Create and save a Agilent 6460...
steps.instruction: Create and save a Agilent 6460 QqQ acquisition method that uses the following source parameters: A B 1 Gas Flow (L/min) 10 2 Gas Temperature 300 3 Vaporizer Temperature 300 4 Nebulizer pressure 30 5 Capillary Voltage 3500 6 Corona Current (uA) 4 Source parameters setting for IPA and internal standard quantitation

steps.title: Update the Agilent 6460 QqQ acquisition...
steps.instruction: Update the Agilent 6460 QqQ acquisition method with the following MRM acquisition parameters: A B C D E F 1 Compound name Precursor (m/z) Product (m/z) Dwell time (ms) CE Polarity 2 Cis-3-Hexenyl Acetate 143.1 83.2 50 5 Positive 3 Isopreneyl acetate 129.1 69.1 50 10 Positive MRM acquisition parameters setting for IPA and internal standard quantitation

substeps.instruction: Update the Agilent 6460 QqQ acquisition method with the following MRM acquisition parameters: A B C D E F 1 Compound name Precursor (m/z) Product (m/z) Dwell time (ms) CE Polarity 2 Cis-3-Hexenyl Acetate
50 10 Positive MRM acquisition parameters setting for IPA and internal standard quantitation

steps.title: Prepare general diluent solution of 50...
steps.instruction: Prepare general diluent solution of 50 micromolar (µM) IS in 50 % volume Methanol (MeOH). This general diluent is used for diluting samples and preparing calibration standard diluent.

steps.title: Prepare internal standard (IS) stock of...
steps.instruction: Prepare internal standard (IS) stock of Cis-3-Hexenyl Acetate (C8H14O2) in methanol at 10 millimolar (mM) .

steps.title: Convert RapidFire sequence data file(s) to individual injection data files
steps.instruction: Convert RapidFire sequence data file(s) to individual injection data files. Sample data files could miss if 'Do not covert missed sips' option in the converting process is checked.

steps.title: Calculate the volumes of general diluent...
steps.instruction: Calculate the volumes of general diluent solution and test samples that are needed to prepare 100 µL, Per sample with predetermine sample dilution factors.

steps.title: Create a new batch in Agilent...
steps.instruction: Create a new batch in Agilent MassHunter QQQ quantitative analysis software, and load all individual injection data files. If this is the first analysis of IPA, create a new quantitative method from acquired IPA standard data file. Other software such as the Agilent RapidFire Integrator could be also used for analyzing RapidFire MS data. Refer to each software user guide for details.

steps.title: Validate and save the quantitative method...
steps.instruction: Validate and save the quantitative method after completing all tasks in the method setup sections. Apply the quantitative method and analyze the sample batch. The calibration standard levels and expected concentrations must match the levels defined in the sample batch table. Refer to MassHunter QQQ quantitative analysis software user manual for more details on setting up the quantitative method. Example IPA calibration curve that shows linear fitting ranging from 1 uM to 500 uM.

steps.title: Change the flow rates of pump...
steps.instruction: Change the flow rates of pump 1, 2, and 3 to that of the running method, and change pump 4 speed to 3 RPM. Close the purge valves of pump 1, 2, and 3 afterwards. %s %s

steps.title: Save sample batch and Export quantitative...
steps.instruction: Save sample batch and Export quantitative reports from batch table for further data processing and visualization.
